news.summary: On June 22, Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric, a top home service company based in TULSA, Okla., commemorates HVAC Appreciation Day. They promote the importance of the HVAC industry by urging individuals to consider enrolling in trade schools or taking up apprenticeships. This initiative aims to address skilled labor shortages in these fields. Established in 2025, this company specializes in HVAC, plumbing, and electric services, emphasizing quality and professionalism. The company's dedication to honoring HVAC professionals is part of their commitment to raising awareness about the significance of these trades. Join them on June 22 in acknowledging and supporting the hardworking individuals who keep our homes comfortable and safe.
news.headline: Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric marks HVAC Appreciation Day on June 22, recognizing the vital role of HVAC techs in keeping homes comfortable. TULSA, Okla., June 20, 2025.

news.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) is set to unveil its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Monday, June 23. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $4.30 per share for this quarter, a slight decline from the $4.37 per share reported in the same period last year. The company is expected to announce quarterly revenue of $580.9 million, up from $552.71 million in the previous year. Sanoke Viswanathan has been appointed as the new CEO, taking over from Phil Snow starting in early September 2025. FactSet Research's stock closed at $425.04 on Wednesday, marking a 0.3% increase. For further details and the complete article, visit Benzinga.com, where readers can find additional insights on analyst ratings and sort information by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and more.
news.headline: FactSet Research Systems Inc. to report Q3 earnings on June 23, analysts expect $4.30 EPS and revenue of $580.9 million. CEO change announced. Stocks rose 0.3% to $425.04.

news.summary: In the current digital landscape marked by instability, Scale Operations Management (ScaleOps) is revolutionizing ecommerce success under the leadership of its visionary founder, Andrew Ukpabi. Based in New York, as of June 20, 2025, ScaleOps has become the benchmark for operations management.
news.headline: Scale Operations Management, led by Founder Andrew Ukpabi, sets new ecommerce success standard post-bubble.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Green Corridors, LLC has announced the approval from the White House on June 9th to establish the cross-border International Freight Transportation System (IFTS) connecting Laredo, Texas with Monterrey, Mexico. This newly unveiled public-private logistics initiative aims to address traffic congestion at the port of entry and in both cities. The system is set to enhance security measures compared to current practices. The Wall Street Journal has spotlighted this ambitious infrastructure project.
news.headline: Green Corridors, LLC approved for $10B project to modernize trade between US and Mexico, improving security and reducing congestion.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Cartesian Growth Corporation III revealed that starting from approximately June 24, 2025, owners of the units from the company's IPO have the option to trade Class A ordinary shares individually.
news.headline: Cartesian Growth Corporation III to start separate trading of Class A shares and warrants on June 24, 2025.

news.summary: Woodcliff Lake, New Jersey - On June 20, 2025, Powerfleet, Inc. revealed that executives are set to participate in the Northland Growth Conference 2025 on June 25th. During the event, they will engage with investors to delve into Powerfleet's AIoT platform, which is currently yielding substantial results. Powerfleet's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AIOT.
news.headline: Powerfleet, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIOT) to attend Northland Growth Conference on June 25 to discuss AIoT platform.

news.summary: Customers can access energy-saving tools and tips to reduce their energy consumption. Financial aid is offered to those struggling to pay their bills. Filmed footage demonstrating energy-saving techniques to combat high temperatures is accessible. The announcement was made in Charlotte, North Carolina on June 20, 2025.
news.headline: Duke Energy offers energy-saving tips in Carolina; financial aid and tools for customers. Beat heat and save money!

news.summary: A new Galvo system called Lumos from WeCreat is offering significant improvements in engraving technology. It is reported to be 3 times faster, can engrave 2 times deeper, and offers true color on metal surfaces. The precision of the engraving is at 8K resolution. This compact system aims to fill the gap in the market where creators typically have to choose between underpowered hobby engravers and large industrial machines. The product was unveiled in New York on June 20, 2025.
news.headline: WeCreat's Lumos offers 3× faster, 2× deeper engraving, true color on metal, 8K precision, making a game-changing compact system.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on June 20, 2025, Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on May 25, 2025. Noteworthy highlights for the Fourth Quarter of 2025 include a notable 10.6% surge in total sales, amounting to $3.3 billion, propelled by a blended...
news.headline: Darden Restaurants reports $3.3 billion in total sales in Q4 of fiscal year 2025, increases dividend, authorizes $1 billion share buyback program.

news.summary: A positive opinion from CHMP was issued based on comprehensive analysis of data, including non-clinical and clinical studies, comparing USYMRO® to the reference drug Stelara®. This development comes from Bio-Thera Solutions Inc., a biopharmaceutical company in Guangzhou, China, listed as 688177:SH. The positive opinion signifies significant progress in the development of USYMRO® as an alternative to Stelara®, showcasing promising potential for improved treatment options.
news.headline: Bio-Thera Solutions gets positive CHMP opinion for USYMRO®, a biosimilar to Stelara®, with strong comparison data.

news.summary: UCB is set to deliver three presentations focused on thymidine kinase 2 deficiency (TK2d), showcasing the disease course in untreated patients and shedding light on the caregiver impact. The presentations highlight UCB's dedication to improving treatment outcomes and enhancing patient experiences in TK2d. This demonstrates UCB's commitment to advancing knowledge in this area.
news.headline: UCB highlights thymidine kinase 2 deficiency research at UMDF 2025 Conference, focusing on disease course and caregiver impact, aiming to improve outcomes.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Integral Consulting Inc., a prominent environmental, scientific, and engineering consulting firm headquartered in Boulder, Colorado, revealed their acquisition of PennJersey Environmental Consulting, located in Milford, New Jersey. This move is aimed at strengthening the company's operations and expanding its services.
news.headline: Integral Consulting Inc. acquires PennJersey Environmental Consulting to expand site remediation services. Acquisition based in Milford, NJ.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, in Detroit, a leading financial news provider in North America, Benzinga, released an announcement. Benzinga is the largest financial news provider in the region and is known for providing valuable information to investors. The announcement is sponsored advertising content and is intended for informational purposes only; it does not serve as investing advice.
news.headline: SoFi and Benzinga partner for investment research, Benzinga largest financial news provider in NA.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Canadian Solar Inc. (NASDAQ: CSIQ) conducted its Annual Meeting of Shareholders in Kitchener, Ontario. All proposals presented for shareholder approval were successfully passed during the meeting. This news confirms the company's stability and support among its shareholders.
news.headline: Canadian Solar Inc. held its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on June 20, where all proposals were approved.

news.summary: Ted Puzio, the owner, reflects on the journey of Southern Trust Home Services, a top home services company based in Roanoke, Virginia. Founded in 2025, the company specializes in electrical, HVAC, and plumbing services in southwest Virginia. Starting from humble beginnings, they overcame challenges to become a prominent player in the industry. Ted Puzio discusses the difficulties they faced and how they managed to establish themselves as a leading company.
news.headline: Southern Trust Home Services, a leading home services company in Roanoke, Virginia, marks 30 years in business.

news.summary: Christel Sheppard from Los Angeles emerged as the lucky winner of Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air's Mother's Day giveaway held on June 20, 2025. She bagged a brand-new water heater as the prize. Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air, a renowned plumbing and HVAC company catering to residential areas, selected Sheppard for this giveaway.
news.headline: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air donates water heater to cancer survivor Christel Sheppard in a Mother's Day giveaway in Los Angeles.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Angus Gold Inc. disclosed that its shareholders have sanctioned the resolution necessary to finalize a statutory arrangement under the Business Corporations Act with Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd. During the special meeting on June 19, 2025, approximately 99.8% of the votes cast by shareholders in attendance or represented by proxy were in favor of the transaction. Angus Gold is listed on the TSX-V as GUS and OTC as ANGVF.
news.headline: Angus Gold shareholders approve arrangement with Wesdome with 99.8% support in special meeting.

news.summary: Miami, June 20, 2025 - AYR Wellness Inc., a prominent U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, has reported an extension of the Limited Waiver Agreement initially dated June 6, 2025. The company, trading under CSE: AYR.A and OTCQX: AYRWF, has formalized an amendment known as the Extended Agreement, stretching the temporary waiver period outlined in the Original Agreement from June 19, 2025, to July 3, 2025.
news.headline: AYR Wellness extends waiver with senior note holders till July 3 in US cannabis operation.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, GXO Logistics, Inc., a leading global contract logistics company and listed under NYSE as GXO, disclosed the selection of Patrick Kelleher as its new CEO. Kelleher, a highly experienced professional in supply chain management, will assume the role on August 19, 2025. GXO is renowned as the largest pure-play contract logistics provider globally.
news.headline: GXO Logistics appoints Patrick Kelleher as new CEO, effective August 19, 2025, world’s largest contract logistics provider.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Axsome Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: AXSM), a prominent biopharmaceutical organization at the forefront of central nervous system (CNS) disorders treatment, has partnered with the Alzheimer’s disease advocacy sector to highlight the escalating influence of Alzheimer’s disease in the US and stress the significance of brain health in observance of this year’s Alzheimer’s & Brain Awareness Month. Joining forces with the advocacy community, this initiative aims to shed light on the pressing issue and underscore the need for increased attention to brain health amid the rise in Alzheimer’s cases nationwide.
news.headline: Axsome Therapeutics partners for Alzheimer's & Brain Awareness Month, stressing brain health. $AXSM, CNS, Alzheimer's impact emphasized.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Fury Gold Mines Limited (TSX and NYSE American: FURY) successfully completed a private placement of 3,999,701 common shares designated as "flow-through shares" at C$0.77 per share. This issuance, following a previous announcement on June 5, 2025, generated total gross proceeds amounting to C$3,079,800. Fury expressed satisfaction with this development.
news.headline: Fury Gold Mines (TSX & NYSE: FURY) closes private placement, sells 3,999,701 shares at C$0.77/share for C$3,079,800.

news.summary: Delray Beach, Florida - A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts that the aircraft electromechanical actuators market will increase to USD 804.3 million by 2030, up from USD 577.1 million in 2025, representing a 6.9% compound annual growth rate.

news.summary: CarMax, Inc. shared its first-quarter results for the period ending on May 31, 2025. The company reported a 42.3% increase in net earnings per diluted share, rising to $1.38 from $0.97 in the previous year. Retail used unit sales saw a 9.0% growth, with comparable store used unit sales increasing by 8.1%, and wholesale units increasing by 1.2%. Total gross profit rose by 12.8% to $893.6 million due to increased unit volumes and strong unit margin performance. This marked a record high gross profit for the company.
news.headline: CarMax's Q1 FY2026 results: Net earnings per share up 42.3% to $1.38; retail used unit sales increased 9.0%; total gross profit up 12.8% to $893.6 million.

news.summary: HTEC, a leading engineering company, has recently inaugurated a new office in Budapest, Hungary. This strategic move underlines the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the Hungarian tech industry. The office launch has also brought about the recruitment of a number of new employees, emphasizing HTEC's dedication to expanding its workforce in the region.
news.headline: HTEC opened new office in Budapest, signifying expansion in Hungarian tech scene with new employees.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Ellomay Capital Ltd. closed an investment deal with Clal Insurance Company Ltd., a major Israeli investor, involving Ellomay's 198 MW solar portfolio in Italy. Clal acquired a 49% stake in the portfolio, which includes both operating projects and those in various stages of construction and development. Ellomay, a company specializing in renewable energy projects across Europe, Israel, and the USA, shared this significant update regarding its solar energy ventures.
news.headline: Ellomay Capital closes investment deal with Clal Insurance for 198 MW Italian solar portfolio - Clal receives 49% interest.

news.summary: Renowned financial analyst Peter Schiff announced his plan to introduce a gold-backed stablecoin, challenging the credibility of those linked to the U.S. dollar. Schiff revealed his intention in response to a suggestion on X platform, asserting his decision to create his own version. This news generated significant interest among users, with some proposing potential names like SchiffCoin and applauding the concept. Whether Schiff's statement was in jest or serious about aligning cryptocurrency with his favored asset remains uncertain. Additional details from SchiffGold and related entities are pending, with updates expected upon their response. This development follows Schiff's tweet on June 19, 2025, hinting at his initiative.
news.headline: Peter Schiff plans to launch a gold-backed stablecoin, questioning value of dollar. Fans suggest SchiffCoin.

news.summary: In New York, Accenture recently released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, concluding on May 31, 2025.
news.headline: Accenture's fiscal Q3 2025 results revealed in New York show promising financial performance ending May 31, 2025.

news.summary: BlackRock's exchange-traded fund (ETF) is close to reaching a milestone of $70 billion in assets, indicating strong investor interest. The dominance of large investors in Bitcoin transactions remains evident, underscoring the trend towards institutional involvement in the cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: BlackRock ETF acquires 3.25% of Bitcoin supply as 'new money' slows, nears $70B mark with large investor dominance.
